rationale: The two papers are tightly aligned on causal dynamics of online ad exposure: the citing paper studies downstream effects across sequential ads and explicitly frames ad variety as an externality across impressions, while the cited paper provides randomized evidence on advertising spillovers and frequency-dependent returns. This makes the cited work a plausible conceptual foundation/comparison point rather than a generic background mention. With a confirmed DOI match (10.1509/jmr.14.0274), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
